About Me

resume, skills, and more

tl;dr

For a downloadable PDF resume, click here.

I've worked through all stages of the development life-cycle for a wide variety of clients spanning many industry sectors. I find myself more at home creating user-friendly, well crafted front-end experiences with a strong focus on usability, performance and maintainability.

I have a background in Microsoft's technologies including MVC, MS SQL and have embraced C# and the .NET framework.

I'm available for freelance! Let's chat via email.

experience

Capital on Tap

Developer

April 2015 ~ April 2016

I mainly worked on front end projects optimising, reworking and improving load times to the public facing sites. I also led the creation and implementation of a custom SASS library into projects, and training members of the team on how to use the lbrary.

During my time at Capital on Tap I also had exposure to some of the .NET back end. - Included working on unit tests, developing the customer portals so users could manage their accounts online.

Balmoral Financial

Senior Developer

November 2014 ~ March 2015

I refactored the company site by re-writing most of the code on the front end. Which led to improvements in the UI and performance of the site overall.

Fasttrack Company

Developer

April 2014 ~ October 2014

I designed and developed the UI concept for the user, and admin areas. I created these using .NET MVC, and WebAPI. Along with the admin areas I also created a conceptual native Android application. This app used Bluetooth LE to communicate with prototype devices and transferred data to the prototype.

NASDAQ OMX

Senior Designer/Developer

October 2012 ~ March 2014

I was employed as the only developer/designer on the team. Utilising the in-house framework I developed newsroom sites for various big brand clients such as Facebook, Sony, Gatwick, Mattel and Centre Parcs.

I also designed responsive, eye catching designs for a number of clients including Sony, and Gatwick. Two of which were put forward for design impact awards.

While at NASDAQ I have gained my MCP, and have been working towards the MCSD: Web Applications certification.

skills

  • Web Design & Development, .NET, Web Forms, MVC, WebAPI
  • HTML, CSS, Sass, LESS, Markdown
  • jQuery, React, AngularJS
  • UI/UX Design
  • Microsoft SQL Server, Microsoft Visual Studio
  • Sketch, Adobe Creative Suite
  • Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Google Webmaster Tools, GitHub, SVN, TFS
  • Photography
